purpose: Initiative District 16. Council District 16 Funding will support The New Settlement Community Ambassador Teen Program, a program that addresses high youth unemployment rates in the Crenulated Company, Ltd., The d/b/a New community. It will support approximately 60 youth through workshops,

career readiness seminars, internships, and community outreach. The Initiative Community Ambassador Teen Program program will hire an internship coordinator to oversee placement and support. Participants will gain valuable skills in health, fitness, and nutrition, while also serving as community outreach workers.
